name: Zombie
languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Undead Fortitude
special_abilities.description: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 hit points, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 + the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the zombie drops to 1 hit point instead.

actions.name: Slam
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

ai_notes: Mindless undead, slow but durable, always moves toward nearest living creature, Undead Fortitude makes it hard to kill
